title: tengine.code.changed v1
description: DEPRECATED (2026-07-02, ecosystem-audit-p2): no producer found anywhere in the tengine repo (source, git hooks incl. .git/hooks/pre-push, scripts/maintenance/git-hooks/) nor in the private nervous-bus adapter overlay (~/.config/nervous-bus/adapters/). tengine's actual pre-push hook runs a schema-COVERAGE gate (scripts/ci/schema_coverage_gate.sh), not a code-changed publisher. No evidenced consumer either. Kept (not deleted) for historical reference pending a human decision on removal. Original text: 'A file in the tengine repo changed. Emitted by post-commit / pre-push hooks. Lightweight signal so cross-repo consumers can invalidate caches or kick CI without polling.'

file.description: repo-relative path of the changed file

commit.description: git commit sha or marker (e.g. 'smoke' for hook tests)
